title: Saathi
subTitle: Ravi marries Shanti, leaving Rajni heartbroken. Unfortunately, Shanti develops a dreaded disease and runs away as she does not want to be a burden on Ravi.

title: Anita
subTitle: When Anita commits suicide, Neeraj suspects foul play and decides to investigate the truth. However, things take a turn when he starts seeing Anita everywhere.

title: Aadat Se Majboor
subTitle: Dinanath, a devout Hindu, wishes to get his son Shankar married to Salma, an orphan who lives with them. However, Shankar's childhood sweetheart Neetu returns to his life.

title: Bhoomi Par Bhagwan
subTitle: Ranga, a reckless man, abducts Ganga, his previous lover and her husband and keeps them captive at his secret hideout location.

title: Woh 7 Din
subTitle: Anand, a doctor, realises that Maya, his wife, loves someone else but married him out of coercion. Thus, he sets out to reunite the lovers, but they don't want to be together anymore.

title: Aashiq Hoon Baharon Ka
subTitle: Chaos ensues as Vikram, driven by greed and ego, hinders the blossoming romance between Ashok and Veera by trapping Ashok with false accusations of theft.

title: Batwara
subTitle: Amidst the fall of princely states in post-independence India, the friendship between aristocrat Vikram and a peasant is tested. Vikram turns vengeful after his brother is killed in a peasant colony.

title: Khatron Ke Khiladi
subTitle: Balwant, a truck driver, is driven into the underworld as he wants to take revenge on the owners of the trucking company for the death of his brother.

title: Purab Aur Pachhim
subTitle: Bharat, a freedom fighter's son, travels to England to study and strives to change the mindset of the people there towards India.

title: Dosti
subTitle: A series of unfortunate events causes Ramu, a young boy, to lose his parents and his legs. He is befriended by Mohan, a boy with visual impairment, and they team up to survive on the streets.

title: Dosti
subTitle: A series of unfortunate events causes Ramu, a young boy, to lose his parents and his legs. He is befriended by Mohan, a boy with visual impairment, and they team up to survive on the streets.

title: Chalti Ka Naam Gaadi
subTitle: Brijmohan, a mechanic, swears off women after a bad experience. However, when a headstrong woman arrives at his garage, he is forced to reconsider his opinion.

title: Sadhu Aur Shaitaan
subTitle: Sher Khan, a criminal, decides to rob a bank. However, his life takes a dramatic turn when he meets a kind-hearted taxi driver.

title: Baadshah
subTitle: An amateur detective, Raj, goes by the nickname of Baadshah. But this name soon causes a misunderstanding that lands him in the middle of a conspiracy to assassinate the chief minister of Goa.

title: Banarasi Babu
subTitle: Sohan Lal, a rich businessman, is abducted and imprisoned. When Gulabiya helps him to escape from the prison, he meets with an accident. He then attempts to sort out his jeopardised life.

title: Baseraa
subTitle: Nima and Balraj's life is thrown out of gear when her sister and Balraj's first wife, Sharada, returns home after spending 14 years in a mental asylum.

title: Humjoli
subTitle: Gopaldas, a villager, dreams of becoming rich and, thus, marries Roopa, an heiress. However, his greed knows no bounds when he plots Roopa's murder to inherit her property.

title: Teri Meherbaniyan
subTitle: Ram, an honest man, falls in love with a woman named Bijli and goes on to help the people of her village. However, the region's corrupt leader, Thakur Vijay Singh, soon begins to plot against him.

title: Andaz
subTitle: Sheetal, a widow, is a school teacher and lives with her son after her husband's death. She meets her student's father Ravi, a widower, and decides to marry him.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
subTitle: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
subTitle: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Phir Wohi Dil Laya Hoon
subTitle: Due to a rift in their relationship, Jamuna leaves her husband and takes her son Mohan with her. Years later, her husband announces that his son has returned, unaware that the man is an imposter.

title: Mausam
subTitle: A medical student nurtures a secret relationship with a woman during his college days. Several years later, he faces a rude shock after finding his illegitimate daughter involved in the flesh trade.

title: Classic Legends
subTitle: Host Javed Akhtar presents the lives and careers of the greatest personalities of the golden era of Bollywood, as a tribute to their work.

title: Shikar
subTitle: A man is killed when he tries to molest a girl. She absconds with the police on her trail and meets a man who tries to help her find the real murderer.

title: Satyakam
subTitle: Satyapriya Acharya, a guiltridden idealist, marries Ranjana, after failing to rescue her from being raped by his employer. However, conflict ensues as he is unable to accept her or her child completely.

title: Saugat
subTitle: Saugat

title: Hero
subTitle: Sooraj, the son of gangster Suryakant Pasha, kidnaps Radha, the daughter of the chief of police. They fall in love after spending some time together but the police and Pasha's men try to catch them.

title: Bombay to Goa
subTitle: Mala, a young woman, witnesses a murder and boards a Goa-bound bus to escape the killer. On the journey, she meets exciting people from different cultures and a young man who will not leave her side.

title: Phandebaaz
subTitle: Rajkumar, a poor young man, enters a town and meets Rana, his rich look-alike. He impersonates him and falls in love with a rich girl.
